dict ValidateFits.params
 
 ValidateFits.param_fname = sys.argv[1]
 
dict ValidateFits.runflag = params['RunFlag'][0]
 
dict ValidateFits.output_fname = params['OutputList'][0]
 
 ValidateFits.outputs = np.loadtxt(output_fname,unpack=True)
 
int ValidateFits.Nerrors = 0
 
str ValidateFits.pin_fname = f'pinocchio.{z:6.4f}.{runflag}.catalog.out'
 
 ValidateFits.cat1 = rp.catalog(pin_fname,silent=True)
 
str ValidateFits.fits_fname = pin_fname[:-3]+'fits'
 
 ValidateFits.f = fits.open(fits_fname)
 
list ValidateFits.names = []
 
str ValidateFits.n = f'TTYPE{i}'
